bird.name: Sangihe whistler
bird.summary: The Sangihe whistler or Sangihe shrikethrush (Coracornis sanghirensis) is a species of bird in the family Pachycephalidae. It is endemic to…

relations.subject: Sangihe whistler
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Sangihe whistler
relations.evidence: |date=2022-09-05 |title=On the edge: habitat restoration priorities for three critically endangered bird species on Sangihe, Indonesia |journal=Restoration Ecology |volume=31 |issue=1 |doi=10.1111/rec.13770 |issn=1061-2971|doi-access=free }} It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
